instruction: Click the location/city search input field on weather.com where you can type a city name to get weather forecasts.
observedDescription: Textbox for searching a location to get weather forecasts

aria.className: file:text-foreground selection:bg-primary selection:text-primary-foreground dark:bg-input/30 flex w-full min-w-0 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-base shadow-xs outline-none file:inline-flex file:h-7 file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 md:text-sm focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px] aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive relative box-border h-12 rounded-3xl border-2 border-[#3A61CC00] bg-white! pr-10 pl-9.5 transition-all placeholder:text-gray-900 placeholder:transition-all hover:border-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 focus:placeholder:text-gray-400 focus-visible:border-blue-500 max-md:z-2

description: Wait after: Click location search input
Type "Seattle, WA" in the search box

instruction: Click the first location suggestion/result in the dropdown that appeared after typing "Seattle, WA".
observedDescription: The first location suggestion/result in the dropdown for 'Seattle, WA'.

aria.className: flex min-w-0 flex-1 shrink-1 cursor-pointer items-center gap-3 md:gap-4

description: Wait after: Click first location suggestion

forecast.conditions: Partly cloudy this evening followed by mostly cloudy skies and a few showers after midnight.
